message:
feat(tui): enhance history panel with filtering, copy, and replay

Major improvements to the dashboard's history panel for better
navigation of session history and prompt reuse workflows.

New filtering capabilities:
- Status filter (all/success/failure) cycles with 'f' key
- Session filter shows only entries matching current session
- Increased fetch limit from 20→200 for deeper history access
- Combined filters stack (session + status)

Copy-to-clipboard support:
- 'c' key copies the selected entry's prompt to system clipboard
- Uses internal/clipboard package for cross-platform support
- Status message confirms successful copy
- Graceful error handling if clipboard unavailable

Replay functionality:
- Enter key on selected entry emits ReplayRequestMsg
- Dashboard executes replay through existing executeReplay handler
- Enables quick re-sending of previous successful prompts

Panel state management:
- SetPanes() method keeps history panel synced with pane list changes
- Prevents stale pane references after add/remove/reorder operations
- Panel receives pane updates from dashboard's PaneUpdateMsg handler

Keyboard navigation improvements:
- Up/Down restricted to PanelPaneList and PanelDetail focus states
- Prevents cursor movement when history panel is focused
- Escape exits history panel (removed from quit binding)
- Zoom ('z') only acts when appropriate panel focused

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
